action.content:

action.content: Expression: a 5x5 grid with X in every cell of odd rows and every odd column of even rows, forming a checkerboard pattern with X at positions (1,2), (1,4), (2,1), (2,3), (2,5), (3,2), (3,4), (4,1), (4,3), (4,5), (5,2), (5,4)
